electric-cobalt.$description: Electric Cobalt — Violet supporting accent for decorative details and low-frequency emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, logo wordmark, icon strokes, nav labels, and footer copy. Used at 21:1 contrast on white for absolute legibility

graphite.$description: Graphite — Supporting neutral for secondary UI, dividers, and muted labels.

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Page canvas, product card backgrounds, and nav bar surface. The dominant ground that lets editorial photography breathe

bone.$description: Bone — Subtle box-shadow tint and hairline border for elevated overlays. Used minimally — the system prefers whitespace to tinted surfaces

helvetica-monospaced-pro.$description: Helvetica Monospaced Pro — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

acne-studios-custom-wordmark.$description: Oversized brand wordmark overlaid on hero photography. The custom face has geometric construction with humanist terminals; no system font replicates it, but its character is closest to a wide-aperture geometric sans.

helvetica-neue-system-sans.$description: All functional UI text: nav links, section labels, product captions, footer. Always rendered uppercase with generous tracking — this typographic treatment is the single most recognizable non-photographic element on the site.

paper-white.$description: Surface level 1: Page canvas and dominant background across all sections

bone.$description: Surface level 2: Imperceptible shadow and border tint for subtle UI lift
